mapper.sql: SELECT t.template_id, t.category_id, c.category_name, t.template_name, t.version, t.active, COUNT(DISTINCT i.item_id) AS item_count, COUNT(o.option_id) AS option_count, m.name AS created_by_name, t.updated_at FROM tb_inspection_template t INNER JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = t.company_id AND c.category_id = t.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_member m ON m.company_id = t.company_id AND m.member_id = t.created_by LEFT JOIN tb_inspection_template_item i ON i.template_id = t.template_id LEFT JOIN tb_inspection_template_item_option o ON o.item_id = i.item_id
mapper.select: GROUP BY t.template_id, t.category_id, c.category_name, t.template_name, t.version, t.active, m.name, t.updated_at ORDER BY t.updated_at DESC, t.template_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_inspection_template t INNER JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = t.company_id AND c.category_id = t.category_id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.template_id) AS total_count, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.active = TRUE THEN t.template_id END), 0) AS active_count, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT i.item_id), 0) AS item_count, COALESCE(COUNT(o.option_id), 0) AS option_count FROM tb_inspection_template t INNER JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = t.company_id AND c.category_id = t.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_inspection_template_item i ON i.template_id = t.template_id LEFT JOIN tb_inspection_template_item_option o ON o.item_id = i.item_id

SELECT template_id, company_id, category_id, template_name, version, active, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_inspection_template WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND template_id = #{templateId}
WHERE t.company_id = #{companyId} AND t.template_id = #{templateId} GROUP BY t.template_id, t.category_id, c.category_name, t.template_name, t.version, t.active, m.name, t.updated_at

SELECT item_id, template_id, item_group, item_name, input_type, required, sort_order, grade_impact, fail_policy, active FROM tb_inspection_template_item WHERE template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY item_group ASC, sort_order ASC, item_id ASC

SELECT o.option_id, o.item_id, o.option_label, o.option_value, o.sort_order, o.active FROM tb_inspection_template_item_option o INNER JOIN tb_inspection_template_item i ON i.item_id = o.item_id WHERE i.template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY o.item_id ASC, o.sort_order ASC, o.option_id ASC

SELECT i.item_id, i.template_id, i.item_group, i.item_name, i.input_type, i.required, i.sort_order, i.grade_impact, i.fail_policy, i.active FROM tb_inspection_template_item i INNER JOIN tb_inspection_template t ON t.template_id = i.template_id WHERE t.company_id = #{companyId} AND t.template_id = #{templateId} AND i.item_id = #{itemId}

SELECT o.option_id, o.item_id, o.option_label, o.option_value, o.sort_order, o.active FROM tb_inspection_template_item_option o INNER JOIN tb_inspection_template_item i ON i.item_id = o.item_id INNER JOIN tb_inspection_template t ON t.template_id = i.template_id WHERE t.company_id = #{companyId} AND t.template_id = #{templateId} AND i.item_id = #{itemId} AND o.option_id = #{optionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_inspection_template ( company_id, category_id, template_name, version, active, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{categoryId}, #{templateName}, #{version}, #{active}, #{createdBy}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_inspection_template SET category_id = #{categoryId}, template_name = #{templateName}, version = #{version}, active = #{active}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND template_id = #{templateId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_inspection_template_item ( template_id, item_group, item_name, input_type, required, sort_order, grade_impact, fail_policy, active ) VALUES ( #{templateId}, #{itemGroup}, #{itemName}, #{inputType}, #{required}, #{sortOrder}, #{gradeImpact}, #{failPolicy}, #{active} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_inspection_template_item SET item_group = #{itemGroup}, item_name = #{itemName}, input_type = #{inputType}, required = #{required}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, grade_impact = #{gradeImpact}, fail_policy = #{failPolicy}, active = #{active} WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_inspection_template_item_option ( item_id, option_label, option_value, sort_order, active ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{optionLabel}, #{optionValue}, #{sortOrder}, #{active} )
